name: OpenRouter
access_method: API key via OpenRouter dashboard; OpenAI-compatible base URL; official SDK; Agent SDK
cost_notes: Usage-based by selected model. OpenRouter Auto Router has no extra routing fee beyond the selected model price according to current docs. Free-model routes may exist but must be rate-limit checked before production.

abba_policy.rule: OpenRouter may route model calls, but ABBA remains resolver and SEAL remains approval authority.

activation_path: Add OPENROUTER_API_KEY to Vercel and GitHub secrets only, never repo files.
Expose a health-safe provider card in /api/swarm/providers.
Use openrouter/auto only for sandbox and non-sensitive ABBA tasks first.
Add allowed model patterns for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, Meta, Mistral, Qwen and free-model candidates after testing.
Log selected model metadata, cost estimate, latency and error status only; do not log raw private prompts by default.
Add SEAL-4 review before customer-facing, identity, finance, legal, or HAPI memory tasks.
